title: Clinical Guideline Revised Before Treatment Execution
scenario: A treatment is authorized under a prior guideline, but the applicable clinical guideline is revised before execution.
initial_state: The treatment was authorized under the prior clinical guideline.
state_transition: The applicable guideline changes before execution.
execution_boundary: Treatment execution is evaluated immediately before administration.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution must conform to the current clinical policy or guideline when it governs admissibility.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the current guideline no longer admits the treatment as authorized.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when current guideline conformance is not established.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under superseded clinical guideline
